Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\User\\redsec" && pip install pydantic --break-system-packages && python -c "
from redsec.models import RedSecEvent, EventType, Severity, ToolName
from datetime import datetime, timezone

event = RedSecEvent\(
    tool=ToolName.nmap,
    event_type=EventType.port_scan,
    severity=Severity.info,
    timestamp=datetime.now\(timezone.utc\),
    target='192.168.1.1',
    port=80,
    protocol='tcp',
    description='Port 80 open'
\)

print\(event.to_sec_line\(\)\)
print\(event.model_dump_json\(indent=2\)\)
")
